biography: Daniel Barnett is known for The Red Sea Diving Resort (2019), The Mauritanian (2021) and Planet of the Sharks (2016). His most recent notable roles include The Umbrella Men (2022) and it's sequel, playing the slimy banker 'Mr El Fontein', and the as-yet unreleased Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die (dir. Gore Verbinsky) in which he plays the character 'Bob', opposite Sam Rockwell.
name: Daniel Barnett
